scripts.test: NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' DATABASE_URL='postgresql://test:test@localhost:5432/testdb' JWT_SECRET='test-secret-at-least-16-chars' ENCRYPTION_SECRET=12345678901234567890123456789012 GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID='mock-id' GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET='mock-secret' GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL='http://localhost:3000' OPENROUTER_API_KEY='mock-key' COHERE_API_KEY='mock-key' PINECONE_API_KEY='mock-key' npx jest --detectOpenHandles --forceExit
scripts.test:coverage: NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' DATABASE_URL='postgresql://test:test@localhost:5432/testdb' JWT_SECRET='test-secret-at-least-16-chars' ENCRYPTION_SECRET=12345678901234567890123456789012 GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID='mock-id' GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET='mock-secret' GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL='http://localhost:3000' OPENROUTER_API_KEY='mock-key' COHERE_API_KEY='mock-key' PINECONE_API_KEY='mock-key' npx jest --coverage --detectOpenHandles --forceExit
